channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RUCHIRA] Ruchira Papers Ltd: Appointment of New Managing Director and Executive Director
item.description:
Ruchira Papers Ltd has announced the appointment of Sh. Jatinder Singh as Managing Director and Smt. Shashi Garg as an Additional Director and Whole-Time Director (Executive Director) effective from 09.04.2026. The appointments are subject to the approval of the shareholders of the company. Sh. Subhash Chander Garg and Sh. Deepan Garg have been designated as Chairman and Co-Chairman of the company respectively.

  • Sh. Jatinder Singh appointed as Managing Director of Ruchira Papers Ltd.
  • Smt. Shashi Garg appointed as Additional Director and Whole-Time Director (Executive Director) of Ruchira Papers Ltd.
  • Sh. Subhash Chander Garg designated as Chairman of the company.
  • Sh. Deepan Garg designated as Co-Chairman of the company.
  • Appointments are subject to the approval of the shareholders of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RUCHIRA PAPERS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [HFIL] Himalaya Food International Ltd Announces EGM for Capital Increase, Auditor Appointment, and Loan Conversion
item.description:
Himalaya Food International Ltd has called for an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) on May 2, 2026, at 3:00 PM IST. The meeting will be held through video conferencing and will cover three main agenda items. The first item is an ordinary resolution to increase the company's authorized share capital from ₹90,00,00,000 to ₹150,00,00,000. The second item is the appointment of M/s. Kumar Rupak & Associates, Chartered Accountants as the new statutory auditor. The third item is a special resolution to enable the conversion of loans into equity up to ₹25 Crores.

  • Himalaya Food International Ltd has scheduled an Extraordinary General Meeting for May 2, 2026
  • The company aims to increase its authorized share capital from ₹90,00,00,000 to ₹150,00,000
  • M/s. Kumar Rupak & Associates, Chartered Accountants has been proposed as the new statutory auditor
  • The EGM will discuss the conversion of loans into equity up to ₹25 Crores

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Himalaya Food International Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SEAMECLTD] Seamec Ltd Temporarily Withdraws Vessel 'SEAMEC AGASTYA' Due to Technical Issues
item.description:
Seamec Ltd has temporarily taken its vessel 'SEAMEC AGASTYA' out of service from 9th April 2026, 08:30 hours due to a technical issue. The company will resume operations after the technical glitch is resolved and will inform accordingly.

  • Seamec Ltd temporarily withdraws 'SEAMEC AGASTYA' for technical reasons
  • Vessel taken out of service from 9th April 2026, 08:30 hours
  • Operations to resume after redressal of technical defect
  • Company to inform once the vessel is back in service

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SEAMEC LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [OILCOUNTUB] Oil Country Tubular Ltd Approves Term Loan Agreement of Rs. 6.82 Crores with Cosmos Co-Operative Bank Ltd
item.description:
Oil Country Tubular Ltd's Board of Directors approved a Term Loan Agreement with Cosmos Co-Operative Bank Ltd on 09.04.2026. The company will avail a Term Loan facility amounting to Rs. 6.82 Crores (Rupees Six Crores Eighty-Two Lakhs Only) for purchasing new machinery/equipment. The company holds 20 equity shares at the rate of Rs. 100/- each in the Bank. The loan agreement includes a Bank's Mortgage charge on an Industrial Shed located at a specific address in Andhra Pradesh.

  • Oil Country Tubular Ltd approved a Term Loan Agreement with Cosmos Co-Operative Bank Ltd.
  • The loan amount is Rs. 6.82 Crores (Rupees Six Crores Eighty-Two Lakhs Only).
  • The purpose of the loan is to purchase new machinery/equipment.
  • The company holds 20 equity shares at the rate of Rs. 100/- each in the Bank.
  • The loan agreement includes a Bank's Mortgage charge on an Industrial Shed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OIL COUNTRY TUBULAR LTD. | Category: Loan Agreement

item.title: [DBL] Dilip Buildcon Limited Declared L-1 Bidder for Rs. 268 Crore EPC Project by Narmada Water Resources Department, Gujarat
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dilip Buildcon Limited (DBL) has announced that its joint venture with RBL, DBL-RBL, has been declared as L-1 bidder for a Rs. 268 Crore EPC project by the Narmada Water Resources Water Supply & Kalpasar Department, Government of Gujarat. The project involves the Designing and Construction of Ged Barrage, Protection work & Other allied activities across river Sabarmati between Hirpura barrage & Lakroda weir, including Operation and Maintenance for 10 Years.

  • Dilip Buildcon Limited's joint venture with RBL declared as L-1 bidder for a Rs. 268 Crore EPC project.
  • Project involves the Designing and Construction of Ged Barrage, Protection work & Other allied activities across river Sabarmati between Hirpura barrage & Lakroda weir.
  • Includes Operation and Maintenance for 10 Years.
  • Project awarded by Narmada Water Resources Water Supply & Kalpasar Department, Government of Gujarat.
  • Completion period set for 24 months.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dilip Buildcon Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RADHIKAJWE] Radhika Jeweltech Ltd: No Encumbrance of Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Radhika Jeweltech Ltd, in compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011, has disclosed that neither the promoters nor the promoters group or Person acting in concert (PAC) had made any encumbrance of shares, directly or indirectly, during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. Furthermore, as of the same date, nil number of shares of the company are encumbered or pledged by the promoters.

  • Radhika Jeweltech Ltd discloses no encumbrance of shares for FY 2025-2026
  • No shares were pledged or encumbered by promoters as of March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Radhika Jeweltech Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [RUCHIRA] Ruchira Papers Ltd: Appointment of New Managing Director and Executive Director, Change in Designations
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ruchira Papers Ltd announced the appointment of Sh. Jatinder Singh as Managing Director and Smt. Shashi Garg as Additional Director and Whole-Time Director (Executive Director) at its Board Meeting held on 09.04.2026. Sh. Subhash Chander Garg and Sh. Deepan Garg were designated as Chairman and Co-Chairman, respectively. The appointments are subject to the approval of the shareholders of the company.

  • Appointment of Sh. Jatinder Singh as Managing Director
  • Appointment of Smt. Shashi Garg as Additional Director and Whole-Time Director (Executive Director)
  • Designation of Sh. Subhash Chander Garg as Chairman
  • Designation of Sh. Deepan Garg as Co-Chairman

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RUCHIRA PAPERS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HEMANG] Hemang Resources Ltd Clarifies Share Price Movement Due to Market Conditions
item.description:
Hemang Resources Ltd has informed the BSE of all events and price sensitive information as required by the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015. The company confirmed that the movement in its share price is due to market conditions and not influenced by any internal factors. Hemang Resources Ltd reiterates its adherence to the regulations and will continue to inform the Stock Exchange of any required information as needed.

  • Hemang Resources Ltd has informed the BSE of all required events and price sensitive information.
  • The company's share price movement is due to market conditions and not influenced by internal factors.
  • Hemang Resources Ltd reiterates its adherence to SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015.
  • The company will continue to inform the Stock Exchange of required information as needed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hemang Resources Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ESSEX] Essex Marine Ltd Clarifies on Share Price Movement, No Internal Connection
item.description:
Essex Marine Ltd has clarified the movement in its share price, stating that it has always disclosed material information to the stock exchange as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company is not aware of the reason for the significant movement in its share price, attributing it to market dynamics. The management is not connected with the price movement. Essex Marine reiterates its commitment to adhere to all compliances under the Listing Regulations and other applicable laws.

  • Essex Marine Ltd has clarified the movement in its share price.
  • The company has always disclosed material information as per SEBI regulations.
  • The significant movement in share price is attributed to market dynamics.
  • The management is not connected with the price movement.
  • Essex Marine reiterates its commitment to adhere to all compliances under the Listing Regulations and other applicable laws.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Essex Marine Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KALLAM] Kallam Textiles Ltd: Union Bank of India Appoints IRP Under IBC
item.description:
Kallam Textiles Ltd has been served with an appointment of an Interim Resolution Professional (IRP) by Union Bank of India under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 (IBC). The bank had filed an application before the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) under Section 7 of the IBC, which has been admitted. The order was delivered on 6th April, 2026, and the IRP, Mr. Chillale Rajesh, has been appointed to manage the corporate insolvency resolution process.

  • Union Bank of India appoints IRP for Kallam Textiles Ltd under IBC
  • Kallam Textiles Ltd facing insolvency proceedings under NCLT
  • Mr. Chillale Rajesh appointed as IRP for Kallam Textiles Ltd
  • The proceedings are under Section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016
  • The order was delivered on 6th April, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kallam Textiles Ltd-$ | Category: Insolvency
